name: oopsie-exceptions-monorepo
description: Root of the @oopsie-exceptions/* npm monorepo — JS port of the oopsie_exceptions Ruby gem.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @oopsie-exceptions/core && npm run build -w @oopsie-exceptions/node -w @oopsie-exceptions/browser && npm run build -w @oopsie-exceptions/nextjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/node/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/browser/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/nextjs/tsconfig.json --noEmit

author: Troy Anderson
